commerce_products_semantics_check.name: commerce_products_semantics_check
commerce_products_semantics_check.value:
(
    ("commerce_products"."kind" = 'club' and "commerce_products"."duration_days" > 0 and "commerce_products"."entitlement_key" = 'club')
    or ("commerce_products"."kind" = 'pack' and "commerce_products"."entitlement_key" = 'pack' and "commerce_products"."scope" is not null and length("commerce_products"."scope") > 0)
    or ("commerce_products"."kind" = 'tip' and "commerce_products"."entitlement_key" = 'supporter')
  )

danetki_message_user_idempotency_unique.name: danetki_message_user_idempotency_unique
danetki_message_user_idempotency_unique.where: "danetki_messages"."sender_user_id" is not null and "danetki_messages"."idempotency_key" is not null

game_session_pack_user_position_unique.name: game_session_pack_user_position_unique
game_session_pack_user_position_unique.where: "game_sessions"."pack_id" is not null and "game_sessions"."pack_position" is not null

game_session_pack_fields_check.name: game_session_pack_fields_check
game_session_pack_fields_check.value: ("game_sessions"."kind" = 'pack' and "game_sessions"."pack_id" is not null and "game_sessions"."pack_position" is not null) or ("game_sessions"."kind" <> 'pack' and "game_sessions"."pack_id" is null and "game_sessions"."pack_position" is null)
